personalInformation.description: Update your application information here. Your saved data will be used to prefill future application forms.

loadFailed.detail: Failed to load application information. Please try again.

saved.detail: Application information saved successfully. Changes will be applied to your next application.

saveFailed.detail: Failed to save application information. Please try again.

loadFailed.detail: Failed to load notification settings. Please try again.

saveFailed.detail: Failed to update notification settings. Please try again.

submission.title: Application Submission
submission.description: Receive an email when you submit or withdraw an application.

outcome.title: Application Outcome
outcome.description: Receive an email when your application is accepted or rejected.

subjectAreas.title: Job Postings
subjectAreas.description: Receive emails about new job postings. After enabling, you can choose your preferred subject areas.
subjectAreas.emptyFilter: No subject areas match your search.

loadFailed.detail: Failed to load selected subject areas. Please try again.

saveFailed.detail: Failed to update selected subject areas. Please try again.

new.title: New Applications
new.description: Receive an email when a new application is received for your job posting.

accepted.title: Application Accepted
accepted.description: Receive a copy of the acceptance email sent to the applicant when an application for one of your job postings is accepted.

profilePicture.description: Make your profile more personal with a photo.

saved.detail: Your profile picture was updated successfully.

saveFailed.detail: Failed to update your profile picture. Please try again.

deleted.detail: Your profile picture was removed successfully.

deleteFailed.detail: Failed to remove your profile picture. Please try again.

fileTooLarge.detail: Please choose an image smaller than 5 MB.

invalidFileType.detail: Please choose a JPEG, JPG, or PNG image.

resetConfirm.message: Are you sure you want to delete your current profile picture?

aiFeatures.description: Control whether AI-powered features are enabled for your account.

saveFailed.detail: Failed to update AI settings. Please try again.

loadFailed.detail: Failed to load AI settings. Please try again.

modal.intro: TUMApply uses AI to enhance your experience. Here is what you should know:

processing.description: Your data is processed via Azure OpenAI, hosted on EU servers. Your data is never used for model training.

scope.applicant: As an applicant, AI can automatically extract your personal details from your CV to pre-fill application forms, saving you time.
scope.professorOrEmployee: As a professor or employee, AI can generate job posting descriptions and translate them between German and English.

consent.description: You can enable or disable AI features at any time using the toggle in your settings. Disabling AI will not delete any data that was previously processed.
consent.descriptionSettings: You can enable or disable AI features at any time using the toggle. Disabling AI will not delete any data that was previously processed.

documents.description: Upload and manage your documents here. Your saved documents will be used to prefill future application forms.

loadFailed.detail: Failed to load documents. Please try again.

saved.detail: Documents saved successfully. Changes will be applied to your next application.

saveFailed.detail: Failed to save documents. Please try again.
